body_excerpt: {"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/723292?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/holmie/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/holmie/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/holmie/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/holmie/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/holmie", "id": 723292, "login": "holmie", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjcyMzI5Mg==", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/holmie/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/holmie/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/holmie/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/holmie/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/holmie/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/holmie", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44798", "cvss": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-471", "name": "Modification of Assumed-Immutable Data (MAID)"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-749", "name": "Exposed Dangerous Method or Function"}], "description": "### Impact A user with access to add/change a GitRepository record could use the REST API to directly set the `current_head` field on the record, which was not intended to be user-editable. Doing so could cause Nautobot's local clone(s) of the relevant repository to checkout a commit other than the latest commit on the specified `branch` (resulting in misleading state), or potentially to be unable to make use of the repository at all (until manually remediated) due to the `current_head` pointing to a nonexistent commit hash or malformed value. ### Patches The issue has been remediated in Nautobot v2.4.33 and 3.1.2. ### Workarounds Note that many of the same end-result symptoms could be caused by a user with the same level of access simply changing the `branch` or `remote_url` of a GitRepository rather than crafting the `current_head`. Administrators are encouraged to carefully review which users are granted permissions to create and modify GitRepository records. ### References - 2.4.33 (patch) - 3.1.2 (patch)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00277, "percentile": 0.19517}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-p3hx-pwf3-j8wr", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-13T15:31:04Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p3hx-pwf3-j8wr", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-p3hx-pwf3-j8wr"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44798"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-28T18:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-05-13T15:31:04Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nautobot/nautobot/security/advisories/GHSA-p3hx-pwf3-j8wr", "https://github.com/nautobot/nautobot/commit/9deddfc91ad9260ad17b5e20084e9e2d15be3609", "https://github.com/nautobot/nautobot/commit/c46f97040b2bde4320be36b23577f19a8bcbd8c3", "https://github.com/nautobot/nautobot/releases/tag/v2.4.33", "https://github.com/nautobot/nautobot/releases/tag/v3.1.2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44798", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p3hx-pwf3-j8wr"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nautobot/nautobot/security-advisories/GHSA-p3hx-pwf3-j8wr", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nautobot/nautobot", "summary": "Nautobot: GitRepository.current_head field should not be writable through REST API", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T10:18:52Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-p3hx-pwf3-j8wr", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.1.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "nautobot"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0a2, < 3.1.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.4.33", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "nautobot"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.4.33"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Nautobot: GitRepository.current_head field should not be writable through REST API
